zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter V. von Vaz於大約1240年出生在瑞士格勞比登瓦斯 奧瓦時，他的父親Walter IV. von Vaz19歲，母親Adelheid von Montfort39歲。他和Liutgard von Kirchberg至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1285年11月4日在瑞士享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter V. von Vaz于大约1240年出生在瑞士格勞比登瓦斯 奧瓦时，他的父亲Walter IV. von Vaz19岁，母亲Adelheid von Montfort39岁。他和Liutgard von Kirchberg至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1285年11月4日在瑞士享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Vaz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Antonio, Manuel, Luis, Alfredo, Alvaro, Joaquin, Jorge, Mario, Victorio, Adriano, Aires, Amandio.  Portuguese Joao, Damiao, Afonso, Henrique, Joaquim, Ligia, Nelio, Paulo.
Portuguese: patronymic from   Vasco  . This surname is also found on the west coast of India, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists.

variants.name: Vasco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Fernando, Angel, Arnando, Arturo, Carlos, Dominga, Enrique, Jairo, Luis, Luz, Sergio.  Italian Carmine, Dante, Giro, Giuseppe, Michelangelo, Nunzi.

Spanish and Italian: ethnic name from vasco ‘Basque’, denoting someone from the Basque Country, or from a Spanish byname or Italian personal name of the same derivation. The inhabitants of this region, which extends between southern France and northern Spain, are first recorded in Latin sources as the Vascones, a word of unexplained etymology. See also Gascoigne . The Basques’ own name for themselves is Euskaldun. Compare Basco .
Spanish and Portuguese: old personal name corresponding to   Velasco  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter V. von Vaz was born about 1240, in Vaz Obervaz, Graubünden, Switzerland, his father, Walter IV. von Vaz, was 19 and his mother, Adelheid von Montfort, was 39. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Liutgard von Kirchberg. He died on 4 November 1285, in Switzerland, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter V. von Vaz est né environ 1240, à Vaz Obervaz, Grisons, Suisse, son père, Walter IV. von Vaz, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Montfort, avait 39 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Liutgard von Kirchberg. Il est décédé le 4 novembre 1285, à Suisse, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter V. von Vaz um 1240 in Vaz Obervaz, Graubünden, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter IV. von Vaz 19 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Montfort 39. Er hatte mit Liutgard von Kirchberg mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. November 1285 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Schweiz.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter V. von Vaz è nato il circa 1240 nel Vaz Obervaz, Grigioni, Svizzera, il suo padre, Walter IV. von Vaz, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Montfort, aveva 39 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Liutgard von Kirchberg. Morì il 4 novembre 1285, nel Svizzera, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter V. von Vazが約1240年にスイスグラウブuンデンヴァズ オバーヴァズで生まれた時，父Walter IV. von Vazは19歳，母Adelheid von Montfortは39歳であった。彼はLiutgard von Kirchbergとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1285年11月4日にスイスで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter V. von Vaz(이)가 대략 1240년 스위스 그라브u든 배즈 오버바즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter IV. von Vaz(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Montfort(은)는 39세였다. 그는 Liutgard von Kirchberg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1285년 11월 4일 스위스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter V. von Vaz nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Vaz Obervaz, Graubünden, Suiça, seu pai, Walter IV. von Vaz, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Montfort, tinha 39 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Liutgard von Kirchberg. Ele faleceu em 4 de novembro de 1285, em Suiça, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter V. von Vaz родился около 1240 г. в местности ваз обирваз, граубuнден, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Walter IV. von Vaz было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Montfort, 39. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Liutgard von Kirchberg. Он умер 4 ноября 1285 г. в местности Швейцария в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter V. von Vaz nació aproximadamente 1240, en Vaz Obervaz, Graubünden, Suiza, su papá, Walter IV. von Vaz, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Montfort, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Liutgard von Kirchberg. Murió el 4 de noviembre de 1285, en Suiza, a la edad de 46 años.
